languages.text: "Почтенный гемункул, он доказал свою ничтожность и скудоумие, перейдя на оскорбления. Я — свидетель{mf||ница} вашего триумфа".
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
languages.original_text: "Почтенный гемункул, он доказал свою ничтожность и скудоумие, перейдя на оскорбления. Я — свидетель{mf||ница} вашего триумфа".

traits.locale_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own negligibility and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own negligibility and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."
"Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

languages.text: "Ehrenwerter Haemonculus, er hat durch die Verlegung auf Beleidigungen seine eigene Irrelevanz und Beschränktheit bewiesen. Ich bezeuge Euren Triumph."
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: "Ehrenwerter Haemonculus, er hat durch die Verlegung auf Beleidigungen seine eigene Irrelevanz und Beschränktheit bewiesen. Ich bezeuge Euren Triumph."

languages.text: « Honorable hémoncule, je crois que cette vermine a elle-même prouvé son incompétence et sa bêtise en recourant aux insultes. Je suis témoin de votre triomphe. »
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: « Honorable hémoncule, je crois que cette vermine a elle-même prouvé son incompétence et sa bêtise en recourant aux insultes. Je suis témoin de votre triomphe. »

languages.text: «Honorable Hemónculo, ha demostrado su irrelevancia y torpeza al recurrir a insultos. Soy testigo de tu triunfo».
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: «Honorable Hemónculo, ha demostrado su irrelevancia y torpeza al recurrir a insultos. Soy testigo de tu triunfo».

languages.text: "Saygıdeğer Haimonkulus, Eogunn hakaretlere başvurarak kendi önemsizliğini ve aptallığını kanıtlamış oldu. Zaferinin tanığıyım."
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: "Saygıdeğer Haimonkulus, Eogunn hakaretlere başvurarak kendi önemsizliğini ve aptallığını kanıtlamış oldu. Zaferinin tanığıyım."

languages.text: “尊贵的血伶人，他以侮辱之词证明了自身的无能与愚钝。我亲眼见证了您的胜利。”
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: “尊贵的血伶人，他以侮辱之词证明了自身的无能与愚钝。我亲眼见证了您的胜利。”

languages.text: 「誉れ高きハエモンクルスよ、彼は侮辱に訴えることで、自らの無価値さと愚鈍さを証明してみせた。私はあなたの勝利の証人だ」
languages.original_text: "Honoured Haemonculus, he has proven his own irrelevance and dullness by resorting to insults. I am a witness to your triumph."

traits.locale_text: 「誉れ高きハエモンクルスよ、彼は侮辱に訴えることで、自らの無価値さと愚鈍さを証明してみせた。私はあなたの勝利の証人だ」
